name: ts-node-pack
description: Pack a TypeScript package into a Node-compatible npm tarball without modifying the source tree
author: Turadg Aleahmad <turadg@aleahmad.net>

scripts.prepublishOnly: node -e "console.error('Do not run npm publish directly on this repo — main points at raw .ts. Run: pnpm pack:self && npm publish ./ts-node-pack-<version>.tgz'); process.exit(1)"
